output.rationale: Focused UI change within game renderer — switching character labels from pixel to web-style. Single system, no cross-boundary concerns.

output.summary: Read directive brief — rebuild character name/status/icon UI to Gather.town web-style from pixel art.

Read vision.md, renderer.ts, spriteData.ts, constants.ts, CanvasOffice.tsx. Current system: canvas-based native fillText() for names with system-ui font, LimeZu 48x48 sprite icons for status, 8x8 pixel art fallback. All rendering in renderer.ts render* functions.
Skipped for medium weight — clear design direction from CEO (Gather.town reference)
Single project: gather-ui-overlay. Riley builds, Quinn+Sarah review. Scope: rounded-pill name tags, status dots replacing sprite icons, lightweight name grouping.

Confirmed: font already sans-serif, ctx.roundRect() safe, AgentStatus only working|idle (no error/waiting). Activity icons must be preserved. Status dot colors exist but unused. Name grouping is highest complexity. ~120 lines change in renderer.ts + 10 in constants.ts.
Medium weight — auto-approved per pipeline rules.
4 tasks decomposed: pill-constants-and-cleanup, rounded-pill-plates, inline-status-dots, colocation-grouping. All P0, sequential (all touch renderer.ts).
Working on current branch — worktree skipped due to shared renderer.ts changes with game-ui-tmx-update directive.

All 4 tasks completed in single builder session. Constants updated, rounded pills with ctx.roundRect(), inline status dots (green/gray), name grouping with 70% overlap threshold. Type-check passes clean.

Visual verification via Chrome MCP confirms: rounded pill name labels, white text, inline green/gray status dots, task info cards rendering correctly. Matches Gather.town reference style. Type-check passes.

Directive complete. 2 files changed: renderer.ts (~284 lines), constants.ts (~284 lines). Dead code cleaned: STATUS_DOT_COLORS, INTERACTION_DOT_COLORS import, sprite-based status icon rendering. Follow-ups: dead statusIcons.ts/uiIcons.ts exports, optional dot animation.
